description: v8.9.0 — Platform taxonomy refactor: WordPress-style plugin/integration architecture, nav restructure, formation grouping/TB mode, dep graph cleanup, AG-UI buffer, SessionManager multi-path, BackgroundTasks ingestion, plugin pages, usage graphs, timeline redesign, Conversations fix, docs update, Plane-PM align agent

stories.title: Sidebar nav restructure — 5-section taxonomy
stories.description: Refactor sidebar_nav.ex into 5 sections: CORE (Dashboard, Sessions, Activity, Timeline), AUTHORIZATION (Authorization, Routing), PLUGINS (dynamic subitems per registered plugin), INTEGRATIONS (dynamic entries from IntegrationRegistry), SYSTEM (Settings, Skills, Ports, Docs). Plugin subitems use nav_items/0 callback from PluginBehaviour. Badge counts on sections.
acceptanceCriteria: 5 distinct nav sections render with section headers
PLUGINS section shows subitems for each registered plugin using nav_items/0 (or default /plugins/:name)
INTEGRATIONS section shows each integration from IntegrationRegistry
AUTHORIZATION section is separate from PLUGINS

stories.title: PluginBehaviour optional callbacks — nav_items, settings_path, plugin_live_module
stories.description: Extend ApmV5.Plugins.PluginBehaviour with 3 optional callbacks: nav_items/0 → [{label, path, icon}], settings_path/0 → String.t() | nil, plugin_live_module/0 → module() | nil. Update PluginRegistry to call nav_items/0 when building sidebar entries. Update PlanePlugin, SimpleAgentsPlugin, CoalescePlugin to implement optional callbacks where applicable.
acceptanceCriteria: PluginRegistry.nav_items_for/1 helper returns nav items or default
At least one plugin (PlanePlugin) implements nav_items/0

stories.title: IntegrationBehaviour optional callbacks — target_native_feature, required_plugin
stories.description: Extend ApmV5.Integrations.IntegrationBehaviour with 2 optional callbacks: target_native_feature/0 → atom() | nil (e.g. :authorization, :sessions), required_plugin/0 → String.t() | nil. Update AgentlockIntegration to implement target_native_feature/0 returning :authorization. Update IntegrationRegistry to expose these in list_integrations/0 metadata.
acceptanceCriteria: IntegrationRegistry.list_integrations/0 includes target_native_feature and required_plugin fields

stories.title: AG-UI EventBus ring buffer 200→20000 + RoutingLive active routes
stories.description: Increase AG-UI EventBus ring buffer from 200 to 20000 events. Find the @max_events or equivalent constant in the EventBus/EventRouter module and update. Also fix RoutingLive to show active authorization-based routing decisions: query SessionStore for active sessions and show their trust levels, recent decisions from PolicyEngine, and rate limiter state per {user, tool} pair.
acceptanceCriteria: RoutingLive shows at least current session trust levels

stories.title: SessionManager multi-path scan — APM sessions + Claude Code JSONL
stories.description: Extend ApmV5.SessionManager to scan 3 paths: (1) ~/Developer/ccem/apm/sessions/*.json (existing), (2) ~/.claude/projects/*/*.jsonl (Claude Code conversation files), (3) /tmp/claude-*/sessions/ if present. For JSONL files: parse first line for session metadata (session_id, cwd, model), count lines as message_count. Store as enriched session entries with source: :apm | :claude_native | :tmp. Update SessionManagerLive to show source badge. The same session detection must be reused by ConversationsLive (US-012).
acceptanceCriteria: JSONL sessions appear in /sessions list with source: :claude_native badge
JSONL parse handles missing fields gracefully
SessionManager.list_sessions/0 is the shared function used by both SessionManagerLive and ConversationsLive

stories.title: BackgroundTasksStore hook ingestion via PostToolUse
stories.description: Create a PostToolUse hook script at ~/Developer/ccem/apm/hooks/bg_task_record.sh that fires for Agent tool use (subagent spawns). On each Agent spawn: POST /api/bg-tasks with agent_id, task description from tool params, project, pid if available, status: active. Also add a Task.start ingestion path in ApmV5.AgentRegistry — when a new agent registers, also create a bg task entry. This populates BackgroundTasksStore so /tasks is no longer empty.
acceptanceCriteria: AgentRegistry.register/1 also calls BackgroundTasksStore to create entry
/tasks LiveView shows entries after agents register

stories.title: Formation graph — namespace-scoped grouping rectangles + TB mode + intelligent clustering
stories.description: Redesign formation_graph.js to support: (1) Grouping rectangles/rounded-rect bounding boxes drawn BEHIND node clusters — group by formation_id, squadron, or session namespace. Each group gets a label header and semi-transparent fill color. (2) TB (top-to-bottom with left-to-right swim lane grouping) as a 4th layout mode in addition to TD/LR/Hierarchical/Card. TB mode draws session columns side by side, with formation nodes stacked vertically within each column. (3) Intelligent auto-grouping: when node count > 50, automatically collapse inactive formations into summary nodes showing count. (4) Formation page dropdown adds TB option and grouping toggle. (5) Namespace-scopable: URL param ?scope=session_id or ?scope=formation_id filters to just that namespace.
acceptanceCriteria: Grouping rectangles render behind nodes with label + fill color
TB mode available in layout dropdown

stories.title: Dashboard dependency graph — project-level grouping + collapse on all-projects view
stories.description: The dashboard dependency graph becomes unreadable when viewing all active projects with many sessions. Fix: (1) Add a project-level grouping rectangle wrapping all nodes for each project. (2) Add a 'collapse project' toggle that replaces all project nodes with a single summary node (project name + agent count). (3) Default to collapsed for inactive projects (no agents in last 5 min). (4) Add a filter bar above the graph: All Projects | Active Only | dropdown per project. (5) Reuse the same session detection as US-005 (SessionManager.list_sessions/0) for consistent project context. The graph becomes the canonical source of active project state.
acceptanceCriteria: Project grouping rectangles wrap all project nodes
Collapse toggle collapses to summary node

stories.title: Ralph plugin page at /plugins/ralph
stories.description: Create RalphPlugin module at lib/apm_v5/plugins/ralph/ralph_plugin.ex implementing PluginBehaviour. Plugin name: 'ralph', version: '1.0.0'. Actions: get_status (read current prd.json), list_stories (all stories with passes status), get_methodology (return Ralph fix-loop methodology description), current_wave (active wave stories). Create RalphLive at /plugins/ralph showing: current PRD summary card, story board (passes/pending), methodology display, fix loop status. nav_items/0 returns [{"Stories", /plugins/ralph/stories}, {"Methodology", /plugins/ralph/methodology}].
acceptanceCriteria: /plugins/ralph renders PRD summary and story list

stories.title: UPM plugin page at /plugins/upm with dep graph auto-filter
stories.description: Create UpmPlugin module implementing PluginBehaviour. Actions: get_plan (current prd.json), list_work_items (all Plane issues via PlaneClient if configured), get_drift (compare prd.json vs Plane state). Create UpmLive (or route to existing /upm) plugin page showing: active PRD, story→Plane mapping, dep graph filtered to current session UAT invocations (query AgentRegistry for agents with role containing 'upm'). The dep graph should auto-populate entries for active UPM workflow agents.
acceptanceCriteria: UpmPlugin registered and responds to get_plan action
Dep graph on UPM page shows only session-filtered entries

stories.title: Skills fix steps selectable + async preview section
stories.description: In SkillsLive, update the Guided Fix Wizard drawer: (1) make each fix step selectable (phx-click select-step with active highlight), (2) add an async preview section — when a step is selected, fire a Task.start that calls ActionEngine.run('fix_skill_frontmatter', %{skill_name: name, step: step}) and streams result back via push_event('preview_result', ...) to a preview pane. The preview pane should show a diff-style view of before/after. Add a 'Copy' button on preview output.
acceptanceCriteria: Fix steps show active highlight on phx-click
Preview pane renders on step selection
Async Task.start fires ActionEngine and result appears

stories.title: Usage expandable input/output/cache token graphs
stories.description: In UsageLive, the input_tokens/output_tokens/cache_tokens fields show 0 even when total_tool_calls has data. Fix: (1) Ensure UsageController.record/2 maps hook payload fields correctly (hook sends input_tokens, output_tokens as top-level keys). (2) Add expandable accordion sections per model in the usage dashboard showing separate bar charts for input/output/cache over last 24h using a D3.js push_event or Chart.js via LiveView hooks. (3) Add sparkline to each model card showing token trend.
acceptanceCriteria: Input/output/cache token fields populate correctly when hook sends data
Expandable graph section renders per model

stories.title: Timeline redesign — swim lanes, filters, drill-down
stories.description: Redesign the timeline LiveView (if it exists, otherwise find the activity/timeline tab on Dashboard). Current timeline is not intuitive. New design: (1) Horizontal swim lanes per agent/session, (2) Color-coded event types (tool_use=blue, thinking=purple, notification=yellow, auth=red), (3) Filter bar: by session, agent, event type, time range, (4) Click event to drill into detail panel showing full event payload. Use D3.js gantt-style rendering pushed via push_event('timeline_data', ...) or a pure LiveView table with CSS lanes.
acceptanceCriteria: Timeline shows swim lanes per agent

stories.title: ConversationWatcher GenServer + ConversationsLive fix — reuse SessionManager paths
stories.description: IMPORTANT: Reuse SessionManager.list_sessions/0 (from US-005) — do not duplicate path scanning logic. Create ApmV5.ConversationWatcher GenServer that: (1) calls SessionManager.list_sessions/0 filtered to source: :claude_native, (2) reads full JSONL content for each session file, (3) parses each line as a Claude Code message event (role, content, timestamp), (4) stores last 500 entries per file in ETS :conversation_cache with 30s refresh. Create/fix ConversationsLive to show: conversation file list with message counts, selected conversation message thread view with role badges (user=blue, assistant=green, tool=gray).
acceptanceCriteria: ConversationWatcher uses SessionManager.list_sessions/0, no duplicate path logic
JSONL lines parse without crash on malformed data
Selected conversation shows message thread with role badges

stories.title: Docs, Wiki, OpsDocs, Showcase — thorough update for v8.9.0 features
stories.description: Update all 4 documentation surfaces: (1) /docs LiveView — add sections for Formation Grouping, Platform Taxonomy (Plugins vs Integrations), AG-UI 20k buffer, SessionManager multi-path. (2) /wiki — ensure wiki entries exist for each new concept: formation namespace scoping, plugin symbiosis, TB mode. (3) OpsDocs (priv/docs/) — update api-reference.md for all new endpoints added in US-001 through US-014, update changelog.md. (4) Showcase — update features.json with v8.9.0 features (formation grouping, plugin taxonomy, TB mode), ensure showcase client reflects updated architecture. Run showcase data sync.
acceptanceCriteria: /docs has v8.9.0 sections for formation grouping and platform taxonomy

stories.title: Plugin/Integration symbiosis wiring
stories.description: Wire the symbiosis logic declared in US-002/US-003: (1) PluginRegistry.check_integration_deps/1 — for a plugin with plugin_integrations/0, verify all declared integrations are registered. (2) IntegrationRegistry.check_plugin_deps/1 — for an integration with required_plugin/0, verify the plugin is registered. (3) PluginDashboardLive shows dependency status: plugin card shows 'Integration: AgentLock [active]' badge if symbiosis declared. (4) IntegrationRegistry.list_integrations/0 returns enriched metadata including symbiosis status.
acceptanceCriteria: Plugin cards show integration dependency badges

stories.title: AG-UI plugin page at /plugins/ag_ui
stories.description: Create AgUiPlugin module implementing PluginBehaviour. Actions: get_event_stats (buffer size, event type counts), list_active_connections (agents with active AG-UI sessions via AgentContextStore), get_routing_table (current event routing rules). Create AgUiLive at /plugins/ag_ui showing: event buffer stats with gauge, active agent connections list, event type breakdown pie chart, routing table with enable/disable toggles. This is the user-friendly AG-UI control plane.
acceptanceCriteria: Active connections list shows agent_id + event counts

stories.title: Persistent Plane-PM align agent — /quality formation deploy
stories.description: Deploy a persistent background Plane-PM alignment agent as part of the /quality formation. This agent: (1) Runs as a GenServer ApmV5.PlanePmAlignAgent, polling Plane API every 5 minutes, (2) Compares prd.json story states with Plane issue states, (3) Detects drift (story passes:true but Plane not Done, or vice versa), (4) Auto-aligns: updates Plane issues to match prd.json passes field, (5) Broadcasts drift events on PubSub 'plane:alignment', (6) Registers itself with AgentRegistry as agent_id='plane-pm-align', role='quality_agent', (7) REST endpoint GET /api/quality/plane-align returns current drift report. Add to supervision tree.
acceptanceCriteria: ApmV5.PlanePmAlignAgent GenServer added to supervision tree

stories.title: Notifications ring buffer 200→2000 + notification grouping
stories.description: Increase notification ring buffer from 200 to 2000. Find @max_notifications or equivalent in NotificationBroadcaster/NotificationsStore and update. Add notification grouping: (1) Group notifications by category (agentlock, auth, sessions, formations, etc.) with a collapsible section per category in NotificationLive, (2) Each group shows count badge and last-updated timestamp, (3) Groups collapse/expand with phx-click, (4) Add a 'Clear group' button per category, (5) Ungrouped view still available as a toggle (Grouped | All). This prevents notification panel from being flooded by repeated similar events.
acceptanceCriteria: NotificationLive shows grouped view by default with category sections
Toggle between Grouped and All view works

stories.title: Agent identity for AgentLock — ID + descriptive name + type classification
stories.description: Every agent interacting with AgentLock/Authorization must have: (1) agent_id (unique, already exists), (2) agent_name (human-readable descriptive name, e.g. 'Ralph-FixLoop-Wave2-Agent3'), (3) agent_type (classification: :orchestrator | :squadron_lead | :swarm_agent | :individual | :persistent_service | :quality_agent | :unknown), (4) agent_definition (either an instance reference to a known agent type from AgentRegistry definitions, OR a new_agent struct describing its purpose). Update: ApmV5.AgentRegistry to store agent_type and agent_definition fields. Update AuthController and PendingDecisions to display agent_name in notifications and UI. Update NamespaceResolver to use agent_name for display labels. Ensure all formation registration patterns include agent_type.
acceptanceCriteria: AgentRegistry ETS entries include agent_type and agent_definition fields
AuthorizationLive audit log shows agent_type badge

stories.title: v8.9.0 release — CHANGELOG, mix.exs bump, OpenAPI update, CLAUDE.md checkpoints
stories.description: Bump mix.exs application version to 8.9.0. Update @server_version and @app_version in DashboardLive. Add v8.9.0 section to CHANGELOG.md with all 18 implemented stories summarized. Update OpenAPI spec for any new endpoints added in this feature set. Update CLAUDE.md Implementation Checkpoints section for v8.9.0. Ensure mix compile --warnings-as-errors passes and swift build -c release passes (if CCEMHelper changes exist).
